Fresh discovery for Cuyahoga County. 14 entities enumerated; 0 known sources to recheck. 19 sources verified but only 2 cleared the 0.60 confidence bar (City of Cleveland parks capital 0.72; Strongsville City Schools 2026 bond page 0.80). Coverage 0.14 well below 0.90 target: most municipal/district procurement portals verified but were rejected by review as generic/empty of current turf solicitations; aggregator (BidNet) and state portal (OhioBuys/DAS) endpoints broken/not_found. Several real turf projects (Westlake, CMSD JFK Stadium, Solon MS turf) were found but their public pages scored below threshold or are on blocked third-party sites. Escalation ladder exhausted -> diminishing_returns. Not ready_for_scrape.
